title: The National Cryptographic Standards (NCS) | NCA
description: NCA landing page for the National Cryptographic Standards (NCS-1:2020). The document includes appendices on topics of importance to cryptographic operations including Post-Quantum Cryptography, Pseudo Random Number Generation and Side-Channel Attacks. Defines MODERATE and ADVANCED security levels.

title: National Cryptographic Standards (NCS - 1 : 2020) - English PDF
description: Full English PDF of the National Cryptographic Standards issued by the NCA, including a Post-Quantum Cryptography appendix among accepted primitives, schemes, PKI and key lifecycle management.

title: National Cryptographic Standards (NCS - 1 : 2020) - Arabic PDF
description: Arabic PDF of the National Cryptographic Standards (المعايير الوطنية للتشفير) issued by the NCA, covering cryptographic primitives, designs, protocols, PKI, KLM and a post-quantum cryptography appendix.

title: NCA seeks public opinion on updates to the National Cryptographic Standards (post-quantum computing algorithms added)
description: NCA news item announcing a public consultation on updates to the National Cryptographic Standards document; the updates add post-quantum computing algorithms (خوارزميات ما بعد الحوسبة الكمية), random number generators, and quantum key distribution, plus updated cryptographic designs.

title: NCA issues the National Cryptographic Standards document (SPA announcement)
description: Saudi Press Agency announcement (16 Aug 2020) that the NCA issued the National Cryptographic Standards document defining minimum cryptographic requirements for civilian and commercial purposes.

title: Securing Data in the Quantum Computing Era for the ICT Sector | CST
description: Communications, Space & Technology Commission (CST) guidance for the ICT sector on the quantum threat and post-quantum cryptography: define PQC capability needs, verify vendors' ability to shift to PQC, integrate PQC into transformation plans, monitor NIST/ETSI/ENISA guidance, and run PQC pilots to evaluate crypto-agility.

title: Quantum Computing in Government Sector | Digital Government Authority (DGA)
description: Digital Government Authority (DGA) digital-knowledge page on quantum computing in the government sector, including the quantum threat to traditional encryption. PQC-specific content not confirmed (page returned 403 / Arabic mirror only).

title: NCA announces update of the Essential Cybersecurity Controls (ECC)
description: NCA news item on updating the Essential Cybersecurity Controls. Surfaced alongside cryptographic-standards queries; ECC references cryptography but PQC reference not confirmed for this item.

title: Saudi Arabia Focuses on Quantum Future at World Quantum Day Event (SPA)
description: Saudi Press Agency item on a World Quantum Day event. General quantum coverage; explicit PQC reference not confirmed.

title: National Quantum Hub | Research, Development and Innovation Authority (RDIA)
description: RDIA National Quantum program page (infrastructure). General quantum/national-quantum program; explicit PQC reference not confirmed.

title: MCIT Announces the Quantum Challenge in Partnership with IBM and the Saudi Quantum Technology Association | MCIT
description: Ministry of Communications and Information Technology announcement of a Quantum Challenge with IBM. General quantum computing; explicit PQC reference not confirmed.

title: Quantum Economy Landscape in Saudi Arabia December 2024 (C4IR Saudi Arabia)
description: Report on Saudi Arabia's quantum economy landscape published by C4IR Saudi Arabia (WEF-affiliated centre). Not a core domestic government issuer; PQC coverage uncertain.

title: SAMA Rulebook - 3.3.9 Cryptography
description: Saudi Central Bank (SAMA) rulebook section on cryptography for member organisations. No explicit post-quantum / quantum-safe reference found.
